zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Smythe de Elye於1490年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾武特比時，他的父親Thomas Smith81歲，母親Isabell De Toft 14GGM40歲。他於大約1506年與Lady Sophie Townsend在英國英格蘭波藍德布藍普頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1538年在他的家鄉享年49歲。

nameMeanings.name: Smythe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Smith
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name denoting a worker in metal, especially iron, such as a blacksmith or farrier, from Middle English smith ‘smith’ (Old English smith, probably a derivative of smītan ‘to strike, hammer’). Early examples are also found in the Latin form Faber . Metal-working was one of the earliest occupations for which specialist skills were required, and its importance ensured that this term and its equivalents in other languages were the most widespread of all occupational surnames in Europe. Medieval smiths were important not only in making horseshoes, plowshares, and other domestic articles, but above all for their skill in forging swords, other weapons, and armor. This is also the most frequent of all surnames in the US. It is very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below). This surname (in any of the two possible English senses; see also below) is also found in Haiti. See also Smither .

English: from Middle English smithe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smiththe). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, occupational, for someone who worked in one, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Smitha in King's Nympton (Devon). Compare Smithey .
Irish and Scottish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac Gobhann, Irish Mac Gabhann ‘son of the smith’. See McGowan .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Smythe de Elye was born in 1490, in Utterby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Smith, was 81 and his mother, Isabell De Toft 14GGM, was 40. He married Lady Sophie Townsend about 1506, in Brampton, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died about 1538, in his hometown, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Smythe d’Elye est né en 1490, à Utterby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Smith, avait 81 ans et sa mère, Isabell De Toft 14GGM, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Lady Sophie Townsend environ 1506, à Brampton, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé environ 1538, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Smythe de Elye 1490 in Utterby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Smith 81 und seine Mutter Isabell De Toft 14GGM 40. Er hat um 1506 in Brampton, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom Lady Sophie Townsend geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb um 1538 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Smythe de Elye è nato il nel 1490 nel Utterby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Smith, aveva 81 anni e il suo madre, Isabell De Toft 14GGM, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Lady Sophie Townsend circa 1506, nel Brampton, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1538, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Smythe de Elye(이)가 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 우터비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Smith(은)는 81세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabell De Toft 14GGM(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1506년 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드 브램프턴에서 Lady Sophie Townsend(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1538년 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.
